dashboard.welcome_headline: Enter the network where ideas connect people.
dashboard.welcome_body: C-Point is a global platform of private, invitation-only micro-networks. Each network is its own world — no public feeds, no strangers, no algorithmic noise.
dashboard.welcome_populated: Welcome to C-Point: a global platform made of private micro-networks. We call them communities.
dashboard.no_description_add_manage: No description yet — add one in "Manage Community".
dashboard.about_talk_prefill: I just read About C-Point — what should I try first?
about_manifesto_summary: C-Point was built on a simple principle: the world is meant to be lived — reconnect with your people in invitation-only communities, with no public feeds or algorithmic noise.
Steve lives inside every community as an intelligent presence; everything shared stays inside until you choose otherwise.
dashboard.about_manifesto_full:
C-Point Manifesto

C-Point was built on a simple principle: The world is meant to be lived. Come here to reconnect with your people, stay present in your world, and actually get back to living.

C-Point is a global platform of private, independent communities.
No public feeds. No self-promotion. No algorithm-driven noise. No fast-consuming content.

A community can be anything — a close group of friends planning trips, a circle debating the future, a place for banter with people who truly get you, or the private network that keeps you connected to the organisations that matter: your alumni group, your school, an investor network, your sports club, or your company.

Inside every community lives Steve — our intelligent presence who deeply understands each member's journey, values and expertise, and quietly works to create meaningful connections and keep the space alive.

Access is by invitation only. Privacy and exclusivity are built in from day one. Everything shared inside stays inside. No strangers. No algorithms deciding what deserves your attention.

This is your world. Come connect with it.
dashboard.about_feeds_intro: Each community has its own private feed: posts, updates, events, polls and media stay inside that invitation-only network.
dashboard.about_dms_para_1: Beyond the feed, use one-to-one DMs and smaller group chats for side conversations, planning and coordination.
dashboard.about_dms_para_2: They sit alongside your communities, so the relationships stay private and intentional.
dashboard.about_steve_para_1: Steve is C-Point's built-in intelligent presence: an always-on member focused on making the platform easier to use.
dashboard.about_steve_para_2: Ask Steve for product help, discussion context, or summaries where your plan allows.

communities.owner_setup_intro_body: We'll start with structure — the shape of your network and sub-communities. The steps that follow focus only on the main community: what it says about itself, the plan, how many members it can hold, its image, and my personality when members talk to me. You can skip ahead whenever you like; you're not committing until you hit Save.
communities.owner_setup_invite_body: This is when your space really comes alive. When you're ready, I'll take you to the Members page — from there you can invite people by link, email, or username.
communities.owner_setup_structure_body: Everyone who joins the community is part of the main network — that's the shared home base. Sub-communities are smaller groups within that network: each has its own membership and its own feed, so only people in that sub-community see what's posted there.
communities.owner_setup_manage_hint: You can finish setting up the community in Manage Community.
communities.owner_setup_manage_nav_hint: Tap More (⋯) on the bottom navigation bar, then tap Manage Community.
communities.owner_setup_structure_plan_intro: To help you plan — you don't have to lock this in yet:
communities.owner_setup_structure_q_count: Roughly how many sub-communities do you want to start with? (You can always add more later.)
communities.owner_setup_structure_q_names: Any working names in mind — by team, cohort, topic, or region?
communities.owner_setup_structure_q_nested: Do you imagine nested spaces (a group inside a sub-community), or is one level enough for now?
communities.owner_setup_structure_manage_hint: See where to manage structure on Communities.
communities.owner_setup_description_hint: This appears under your community name on the feed.
communities.owner_setup_subscription_inherited: Billing and tier for this community are managed on the parent network. Open the root community's Manage Community to change the plan.
communities.owner_setup_subscription_local: Your community plan sets member caps, storage, and more. You can compare tiers and checkout here.
communities.owner_setup_member_limit_help_capped: On your current plan{{tierSuffix}}, you can have up to {{cap}} members. Leave blank for no custom cap.
communities.owner_setup_member_limit_help_open: Leave blank for no custom cap, or set a limit that fits your plan (see Manage Community for the exact ceiling).
communities.owner_setup_image_hint: Banner shown for your community. Save after choosing a file or removing the current image.
communities.owner_setup_image_remove_on_save: Current image will be removed when you save.

communities.owner_setup_footer_hint: Use More (⋯) on the bottom bar anytime for Manage Community.
communities.owner_setup_member_limit_invalid: Enter a positive number for the member limit, or clear the field.
communities.owner_setup_member_limit_over_cap: Your current plan allows up to {{cap}} members. Enter {{cap}} or less.

onboarding_intro.language_subtitle: You can change this anytime in Account Settings.
onboarding_intro.summary: C-Point is built on a simple belief: the world is meant to be lived, and private communities should help you reconnect with your people without public noise or algorithms in the way.
onboarding_intro.steve_body: C-Point's heart and intelligence lives in Steve, an AI user and agent inside the platform. Steve helps you build your profile, answers questions in DMs and group chats, understands what is happening inside your communities, and helps people find the right conversations, knowledge, and connections.
manifesto: C-Point was built on a simple principle: The world is meant to be lived. Come here to reconnect with your people, stay present in your world, and actually get back to living.
C-Point is a global platform of private, independent communities.
No public feeds. No self-promotion. No algorithm-driven noise. No fast-consuming content.

A community can be anything - a close group of friends planning trips, a circle debating the future, a place for banter with people who truly get you, or the private network that keeps you connected to the organisations that matter: your alumni group, your school, an investor network, your sports club, or your company.

Inside every community lives Steve - our intelligent presence who deeply understands each member's journey, values and expertise, and quietly works to create meaningful connections and keep the space alive.
Access is by invitation only. Privacy and exclusivity are built in from day one. Everything shared inside stays inside. No strangers. No algorithms deciding what deserves your attention.
This is your world. Come connect with it.
